title: Mendacian funeral urn
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:BigGizzUrn.jpg|thumb|Big Gizz opens one of the urns.]]

[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] had a colletion of eight '''Mendacian funeral urns''' kept in the ''[[Spirit of Jabba]]'' hidden inside [[Glass Mountain]] and protected by [[Onoh]] and the [[Jabba Tape]]. The urns were from the young [[Krung dynasty]] and were considered priceless. Much to the horror of [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo]], the urns were destroyed by [[Gizman|Big Gizz]] and [[Spiker]].

==Appearances==
*"[[The Jabba Tape]]" {{1st}}
